script.openingLine: Welcome to Replay: Paraguay meet France in the round of 16 at Philadelphia Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: Paraguay meet France in the round of 16 at Philadelphia Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with both sides at the start of a knockout meeting.

moments.spokenLine: Bradley BARCOLA is shown a card for France.
moments.explainer: A disciplinary moment arrives before either side has found the opening goal.

moments.spokenLine: At the interval, Paraguay and France are level at 0–0.
moments.explainer: The score remains level at the break, with the match still awaiting its decisive moment.

moments.spokenLine: Kylian MBAPPE scores for France, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
moments.explainer: France take the lead, changing the balance of the round-of-16 contest.

moments.spokenLine: Manu KONE is shown a card for France.
moments.explainer: France still lead 0–1, with the match moving deeper into its closing stages.

moments.spokenLine: Player null is shown a card for Paraguay.
moments.explainer: Paraguay remain behind 0–1 as the late pressure of the contest continues.

moments.spokenLine: Michael OLISE is shown a card for France.
moments.explainer: France still hold the 0–1 lead with the match in added time.
The final score confirms France's one-goal victory and their progress from the round of 16.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Paraguay meet France in the round of 16 at Philadelphia Stadium.
In the 19th minute, Bradley BARCOLA is shown a card for France.
At half-time, Paraguay and France are level at 0–0.
In the 70th minute, Kylian MBAPPE scores for France, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
In the 81st minute, Manu KONE is shown a card for France.
In the 90th minute, Player null is shown a card for Paraguay.
In the 7th minute of second-half stoppage time, Michael OLISE is shown a card for France.
